rationale: C18 next_cycle_plan called for bug hunt C18 + wire EndRunScreen into GFC. Bug hunt found BUG-030 MEDIUM: _auto_setup() never wired _save_system from MerlinStore — saves silently non-functional through GFC in autoload mode. Fixed. Feature: complete_run() now goes to END_SCREEN phase -> EndRunScreen.tscn. EndRunScreen._ready() auto-wires with GameFlow, fetches last_run_data, shows full CRT-styled end screen (narrative, stats, journey map, anam, faction choice). EndRunScreen.tscn fixed from Node+wrong script to Control+correct script. BroceliandeForest3D._on_run_complete() simplified: removed 60-line inline overlay, now uses GFC. Signal-driven _on_run_ended() and _on_hub_requested() also transition scenes.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C19 (verify EndRunScreen auto-wiring works: _ready() → GameFlow → show_results(), signal chain hub_requested → _on_hub_requested() → HubAntre transition). Then feature: JourneyMapDisplay visual polish — the journey map in EndRunScreen shows run events as a timeline. Currently data-only, needs CRT-styled visual nodes (card dots, connections, score indicators).
